creator: brucegb@bga.com
text:

/usr/local/jdk1.5.0/bin/java -cp /spare/linux64/usr/StorMan/RaidMan.jar com.ibm.sysmgt.raidmgr.mgtGUI.Launch

where

      com.ibm.sysmgt.raidmgr.mgtGUI.Launch

is part of the RaidMan.jar.
